_note: The live Retrospace curated source. Approving a submission is a pull request that adds one site here (see infra/README.md); the deploy publishes it to the directory. The fictional seed in demos/retrospace/data.json is the demo's own and never ships.

sites.title: retrostrap
sites.blurb: The framework's own home: the docs, thirty-four demos, and the kitchen sink, all dogfooded.

sites.title: The Retrostrap Boards
sites.blurb: The community forum: slow, friendly, no like buttons, with a German table, Der Stammtisch.
